title: Support - App, user is logged out, correct data
scenario: Support > App card in App Settings shows tenant info when logged in, and displays None for tenant name/ID/user ID, unchanged App ID, and unknown last connection after logout
steps: Note the displayed data: Tenant Name, Tenant ID, User ID, App ID, Last Connection
Log out of the current tenant account
Go back to App Settings → Support → App card
Observe the displayed data after logout
expected: After logout: Tenant Name, Tenant ID, and User ID show as None. App ID remains unchanged (same as before logout). Last Connection shows as Unknown.
